notableEvents.label: Balk run(s)
notableEvents.detail: With Coby Mayo batting, Leody Taveras scores on a balk. Colton Cowser advances to 2nd on a balk.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill flies out to right fielder Zach McKinstry.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill grounds into a double play, pitcher Kyle Finnegan to second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Leody Taveras out at 2nd. Tyler O'Neill out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill grounds into a double play, pitcher Kyle Finnegan to second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Leody Taveras out at 2nd. Tyler O'Neill out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith grounds out, pitcher Chris Bassitt to first baseman Pete Alonso.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Gunnar Henderson reaches on a fielder's choice. Jackson Holliday to 2nd. Jackson Holliday advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop Kevin McGonigle.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith grounds out, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso.
